title: Rotten Tomatoes' 2026 Golden Globes Predictions
text: Rotten Tomatoes provides its predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes Best Supporting Actor in Motion Picture category. The outlet predicts Jacob Elordi for Frankenstein will win the award. While Stellan Skarsgård and Benicio del Toro are strong contenders, Rotten Tomatoes notes that Jacob Elordi is the best part of Frankenstein, positioning him to lead in this category throughout awards season. The analysis emphasizes the competitiveness of this category with multiple viable candidates. Other major predictions from Rotten Tomatoes include Best Drama for Sentimental Value, Best Comedy for One Battle After Another, and Best Director for Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. The outlet also notes that Sinners could take Best Drama while One Battle After Another claims Best Comedy, with these two Warner Bros. films potentially heading toward Oscar nominations without a clear frontrunner.
